description_long: This is a brown glass bottle with a long neck and a crown cap, featuring a large, colorful label on the front. The label is predominantly yellow with red and white accents, and it displays a graphic of a mug of cream soda with foam, surrounded by decorative text and banners. The neck of the bottle also has a matching yellow label with red and white text. The bottle is opaque except for the label areas, and the glass has a matte, slightly textured finish. The back of the bottle is plain brown glass with minimal or no labeling. The overall appearance is classic and reminiscent of traditional soda or beer bottles.
description: A brown glass bottle with a yellow, graphic-rich label and a crown cap, featuring classic beverage branding and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed yellow label with a mug graphic and prominent text.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curve of the bottle and partial label, with most of the brown glass visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain brown glass with minimal or no label details.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the edge of the label and the bottle's rounded shape.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a bright yellow background with bold red and white typography, and a central illustration of a foaming mug. Decorative banners and stylized text add a vintage, eye-catching appeal.
